sections.paragraph:
m. [f. כְּלִילָה] (from the root כָּלַל)-

(1) adj. perfect, complete, especially of perfect beauty. Eze 28:12, כְּלִיל יֹפִי of perfect beauty. Eze 27:3 Lam 2:15 Eze 16:14.

(2) subst. the whole, the totality. Jud. 20:40 , כְּלִיל־הָעִיר the whole city. Exo 28:31, כְּלִיל תְּכֵלֶת the whole of blue. Exo 39:22 Num 4:6.

(3) i.q. עֹולָה a whole burnt offering, a sacrifice of which the whole is burned, Deu 33:10 Psalm 51:21 .

(4) adv. altogether. Isa 2:18 Lev 6:15.
